response.justification: The candidate is a strong generalist engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the core mandatory requirements are not met. His C++ exposure is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a university thesis, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed (only MySQL/MongoDB), and no Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background — RIDE Capital was a German fintech startup using Node/TypeScript, not a capital markets environment. His recent work centers on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, making him a poor match for this specific consulting engagement despite solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Strong low-latency and high-performance systems experience (DLang microservices handling millions of requests/sec)
Solid engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing expertise
Broad technical range across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with some C/C++ exposure
concerns: C++ experience is brief and dated (~7 months in 2014-2015), nowhere near the 5-10 years required
No Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL/MongoDB

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets / fixed income domain
High-performance systems and strong engineering fundamentals
